response.justification: The candidate is a capable senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows) at re:cinq. However, this role demands a Director-level individual contributor with ~15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise, deep cloud platform fluency, and a track record of strategic influence with customers and partners. The resume shows ~13-14 years of professional experience, no demonstrable AI products/platforms at scale, limited cloud-platform depth (some AWS CDK), and no evidence of advising strategic customers or operating at principal/director IC level. Fit is weak for a Principal/AI-strategy role.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong craftsmanship signals: TDD, OSS founder (GISCollective), talks and workshops
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at scale
Limited evidence of cloud-platform strategy depth or customer-facing advisory work
Career level (Senior/Staff) is below the Principal/Director IC bar this role requires

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and shipped AI products
